Name: -1_ugly_example_work_choose
Representative_Docs: ["If someone has bad taste, they choose art that doesn't fit with the surroundings or clothes that don't make them look good. It is all a matter of personal preference, so when I say someone has bad taste, that is in relation to my own preferences. Another person may think they have good taste. ", 'To piggyback off my clothing example, an individual with "bad taste" in clothing would be someone that has no understanding or doesn\'t make an attempt at understanding what articles of clothing work with, or compliment, each other.', 'A person who has a bad taste is a person who likes ugly and cheap stuff. He/she likes to collect junk or dress ugly. For example, he wears jean and t-shirt to a wedding. Another example, she collects junk jewelry like fake ugly bracelet.']

Name: 0_say_different_mean_usually
Representative_Docs: ['I\'d say someone with a "bad taste" doesn\'t really like things on their own, they tend to be a follower for what\'s popular so they don\'t end up with much of a taste at all. I\'d also say it\'s when they like a lot of things that other people tend to dislike, so they\'d have a "bad taste" compared. Again though, really depends on cultures and areas they grew up, what may be bad tastes where they are, could be good tastes elsewhere.', 'Someone who has bad taste in my opinion would mean that my opinions of those tastes are bad. To put simply, the tastes that I dislike would make me think a person who likes them has bad taste.', 'When I say that someone has bad taste, it means that in my opinion, the things that person likes is very different from the things I like, so, therefore, they have bad taste.']

Name: 1_choices_dont_care_make
Representative_Docs: ['Raunchy choices and/or a big member of the "see me" group who seem to make choices only for attention and no other reason', "I think that the person doesn't think very hard about their decision in regards to aesthetic choices. I also think that they may not think about how individual pieces of their choices fit together to form a big picture, as well as never evolving their taste.", "They are usually just drawn to the flashy, lowest common denominator type of content or aesthetic. I'm all for well crafted, trashy tv or trendy, soon-to-be-forgotten fashion but it's like any diet: variety is something that is a benefit."]

Name: 2_poor_humor_loud_sense
Representative_Docs: ['usually trashy, bad humor, poor technique, poor quality', "Someone who may have their own ideas about the aesthetic qualities of objects which generally go against beliefs held by most people in society. Someone who has a sense of humor that is sophomoric and doesn't realize that others may take offense. A person who can't distinguish the qualities that make items desirable to the majority.", 'Someone who watches conspiracy theory shows and drama based reality TV about people’s personal lives. Ancient Aliens and similar shows acively try to mislead people. Shows like Honey Boo Boo and similar just encourage drama amongst the people involved.']

Name: 3_music_movies_enjoy_shows
Representative_Docs: ["Someone has a bad taste in something when they enjoy something I do not; for example I would say someone might have a 'bad taste' in movies if they watch a lot of rom-coms. Someone else could also say that they have a good taste in movies; it is very subjective.", 'When someone has "bad taste" I tend to think they enjoy media, books, and food made for the lowest common denominator. They are easily entertained by things like reality television, Michael Bay films with tons of explosions, and their favorite music is whatever the latest generic popular rap/pop artist has on the radio.', 'I mean that someone is a mindless consumer. They watch the shows that everyone else watches, just to fit in. They listen to whatever pablum comes on the radio. They enjoy the lowest common denominator. I have described a band before as "music for people who don\'t like music". People who like those insipid bands have bad tatse ']

Name: 4_colors_look_clothing_color
Representative_Docs: ['Some one who has bad taste choses clothes that clash or look gawdy. Bad taste is synonymous with trashy in my opinion. Like polkadot, stripes and neon colors you know it when you see it.', 'When you look at someone with bad taste, there is an unsettled feeling.  In clothing, the styles are not similar, or the colors are not easy on your eyes.  The colors or patterns may be jarring to look at.  At home, decor is not calming or happy feeling.  ', 'Specific examples come to mind right away, of bad taste. In clothing, for example, a blouse, that combines plaid and stripes, anything with a leopard or snake print, or any clothing that lacks modesty for the wearer. A person with bad taste, in my opinion, lacks the ability to create sometihng of beauty.']

Name: 5_art_standards_opinions_artmusicliterature
Representative_Docs: ['Bad taste is enjoying aesthetically or aurally unappealing art according to the standards of society in general. For most people, their own standards are the bar, not society as a whole.', "When I say that someone has bad taste, I generally mean that I view negatively the art/music/literature that that person enjoys.  That is, I don't think it conveys any meaning, I don't think that the person who created it has any talent, and I don't see the value in it.  I have to admit that it often means that this is very subjective, in that it often means that I myself don't like the art/music/literature at all myself.", 'A person with bad taste lacks either the ability or the willingness to think critically about art, and takes everything at face value, or worse, mimics the opinions of others without understanding why other people hold those opinions.']

Name: 6_usually_quality_racist_acceptable
Representative_Docs: ['Usually it is when someone loves something trashy or super offensive in some way. This could be extremely racist or just in poor taste all around', 'It means they do not have a clue about what looks good, what is quality, what is in style, is desirable. Usually they like gaudy and tacky things that may be expensive but horrible looking. ', 'Usually it is about gaining noteriety at the expense of quality. It is a the immature desire tp shock others in negative ways and usually means poor quality.']
